strategy_name: Evolutionary Trading Algo — Casino Perp Layer
description: High-risk directional + grid hybrid on ETH/SOL/XRP perpetual futures. Casino-tier leverage (up to 75x at confluence 9+) gated by 5-factor confluence scoring. Isolated margin. Dynamic sizing keeps liquidation distance > 3x ATR. Funded purely from MNQ/NQ excess profits (house money). Baseline equity protection with auto-sweep to cold wallet.
hypothesis: Crypto perps offer asymmetric reward when confluence of HTF trend alignment, optimal volatility regime, contrarian funding rates, elevated on-chain activity, and extreme sentiment divergence are simultaneously present. By restricting max leverage to only peak-confluence moments and running on house money, the expected value is strongly positive even with a sub-50% win rate, because R-multiples are large when all factors align.

entries.trend_follow: Enter on pullback to 21EMA in direction of 4H bias when confluence > 7
entries.breakout: Enter on break of 4H structure level with momentum confirmation when confluence > 8
entries.mean_revert: Fade extreme move to Bollinger 2.5σ when funding rate is extremely contrarian and confluence > 7
entries.grid_overlay: Crypto seed only — 40-level geometric grid as base, directional overlay when confluence > 7

exits.tp2: 3.0R full close or trailing ATR stop
exits.time_exit: If no TP hit within 48 bars (5m), close at market
exits.kill_switch: Daily loss > 6% OR max DD > 20% → halt all crypto bots for 24h

trend_bias_htf.signal: Daily+4H EMA slope aligned with trade direction

volatility_regime.signal: ATR percentile rank 30-70th (not too quiet, not too wild)

funding_skew.signal: Funding rate > 0.05% opposite to trade (contrarian edge)

sentiment.signal: LunarCrush galaxy score divergence from price (extreme contrarian)

risk_management.liquidation_proof_formula: max_leverage = price / (3.0 * ATR_14_5m * 1.20 + price * 0.005). Reject if < 5.
risk_management.excess_sweep: 60% cold wallet stake, 30% reinvest seed, 10% USDT reserve
risk_management.fractional_kelly: f* = 0.25 * (p*b - q) / b where p=win_rate, b=avg_win/avg_loss, q=1-p
